name: "Breakfast on the Mountain": Picnic Breakfast at Seebodenalp
description: Discover "Breakfast on the Mountain": Picnic Breakfast at Seebodenalp in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover "Breakfast on the Mountain": Picnic Breakfast at Seebodenalp in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Food & Drink
subcategory.description: With the food & drink activities, the focus is on enjoyment. Whether it's a guided tour of a brewery or an extended brunch on a mountain peak, book your culinary experience with or without a guide. Whether a candlelight dinner under a full moon, an early breakfast at sunrise or a delicious fondue before an exciting paragliding flight: a culinary experience goes through the stomach and delights the other senses as well. This is how you create an unforgettable situation in which body and soul are pampered.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: You enjoy breakfast with fresh ingredients in nature on Seebodenalp in the summer.

Enjoy breakfast with a view of Seebodenalp, fresh bread, fruit, and drinks in nature
Breakfast: Enjoy fresh fruit and juice in nature on the Seebodenalp.
Breakfast Seebodenalp with a view of the mountains and nature, ideal for relaxation in summer.
Seebodenalp: Beautiful sunset over the lake and the town, surrounded by forests.
Seebodenalp: View of the mountains and Lake Lucerne, ideal for your relaxation in nature.
